programmes.show_description: Best Beware My Sting: A tycoon hires Frank and Lu to keep an eye on his wayward eldest daughter and ensure that her sister's wedding goes off without a hitch.
In the Presence of the Enemy: Another welcome outing for the superior detective drama. Havers and Lynley's relationship reaches breaking point when they investigate a kidnapping.
Confidence: Chigwell comedy with the two sisters and their irrepressibly naughty neighbour. Dorien joins the Open University, and Sharon perseveres with her job at the bakery.
The Queen of Poisons: Part One: When the Mayor dies in the middle of a meeting, Judith, Becks and Suzie uncover lies, scandal and blackmail. Guest starring Peter Davison.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
The Lost Weekend: Dorien steals the show yet again in the Essex girl comedy. The girls decide to spend a weekend away from home, but trouble strikes before they make a booking!
Consumers: Jim Carver has gone missing, and fears for his safety grow when a youth is arrested in possession of his credit card.
New. Little Brother: A nervous Julia depends on Daniel to help with the pitch for the campus surgery. Nick comes to the aid of teenager who has been stabbed.
New. Larp: Julia is on tenterhooks waiting for news of the campus surgery contract and demands to know whether Daniel has slept with Ellen.
If You Can't Do the Time: Tom and Ed test Chrissie's loyalty as Zubin and Ric investigate the heart transplant incident - for which someone is going to have to take responsibility.
Employee of the Week: Ruth tries to prove she's the ideal candidate to become Jordan's deputy. Shona's disappearance forces Charlie to care for his grand-daughter, with dire consequences.
Consumers: Jim Carver has gone missing, and fears for his safety grow when a youth is arrested in possession of his credit card.
New. Peggy hosts an ill-advised music night in the Vic, with disastrous results. Ian begins his manipulation of Lucy, while Carol ropes Billy into her latest scam.
New. Patrick and Libby, determined to find out Owen's whereabouts, pay a visit to the florist and make a shocking discovery. And a frustrated Peggy finds an unexpected ally in Danny.
Choose a Bright Morning: Vintage high-quality British TV, with stunning countryside and quirky characters! James receives a cry for help from the Bramley family.
Laura rebuffs Ken's amorous advances, while Tom has trouble dealing with his break-up with Emma.
All That Glisters: Frank and Lu find themselves puzzling through the world of enigmatology as they become podcasters investigating a 20-year-old car accident.
Sweet Smell of Success: Sitcom with Chigwell's most famous sisters. In an effort to raise some cash, Tracey thinks about selling Darryl's old car. Sharon becomes a saleswoman.
Eva's Back in Town: Young at heart sitcom. When a worldly-wise old acquaintance of Alvin's makes an appearance, she proves to be just the woman to make Howard's life more complicated.
In Which Romance Isn't Dead - Just Incompetent: Gentle sitcom set in a Yorkshire village. Barry has a lonely neighbour on his hands and takes it upon himself to get him a girlfriend.
The Mischievous Tinkle in Howard's Eyes: Gentle sitcom about a group of OAPs. Howard learns that there are better ways than the phone to contact nature-lovers, and quite openly, too.
New. Smoke & Mirrors: First Chapter: Mattie searches for new clues about her missing mother, but an onstage murder in a production of Jane's book brings her to the theatre.
New. Love the One You're With: After the shooting, the recruits are determined the McIntyres will pay. Stevie goes to arrest the MI5 operatives - but Joseph orders Jonty to let them go free.
Wicca Work: Mystery with the amiable team of experienced, older detectives. An unhinged woman insists the death of a lonely librarian was due to witchcraft.
All That Glisters: Frank and Lu find themselves puzzling through the world of enigmatology as they become podcasters investigating a 20-year-old car accident.
A Suitable Vengeance: Another case for the posh detective with a tough assistant. Lynley returns to his family home but is dragged into a murder case in a nearby village.
The Lost Weekend: Dorien steals the show yet again in the Essex girl comedy. The girls decide to spend a weekend away from home, but trouble strikes before they make a booking!
The Queen of Poisons: Part Two: As the suspects' secrets stack up, Judith, Becks and Suzie still can't find anyone with a motive to hurt the Mayor. Guest starring Peter Davison.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
History: As the girls sort out their jumble for a car-boot sale, Tracey unearths a dark secret in the popular Chigwell comedy.
Lock In: Jim Carver hits rock bottom when Burnside is forced to arrest his old friend for murder.
New. Interventions: Melody helps a couple troubled by the husband's alcoholism and Eva is led to the Mill on her search for a hit-and-run driver.
New. Making Your Bed: A wife drags her husband to the surgery to undergo tests for impotency, but he gets the surprise of his life to see his mistress there.
Striking a Chord: Will questions Zubin's handling of Tom's dismissal during an operation, and Donna is surprised by how seriously Lisa takes her new responsibilities.
No Place Like Home: A mixture of drugs causes Kirsty to collapse, and after she has been secretly treated by Adam, her husband arrives to take her home.
Lock In: Jim Carver hits rock bottom when Burnside is forced to arrest his old friend for murder.
New. Libby forces a confession from Lucas - how will he explain himself? Ian tries to stop Lucy's secret from getting out, but will he succeed? And Billie admits his guilt to Carol.
New. Roxy plans to add to her business empire - but has she competition from an unexpected source? Denise hatches a plan that is Lucas's worst fear and Shirley throws in the towel.
The Playing Field: Christopher Timothy stars in the much-loved veterinary drama, along with sometime Dr Who Peter Davison. Tristan feels Siegfried is giving him the worst cases.
Laura is enraged when she learns Ken has bought her company, and Leo invites Abby to take part in the Isle of Wight race.
O Thou Invisible Spirit of Wine: When paranormal activity is reported in a Tudor pub, old family feuds are brought to a head.
Muesli: Drop in for a cuppa with the Essex sisters. Tracey decides to experience Darryl's ordeal behind bars by creating her own prison in the attic, with Sharon as her cellmate.
Of Passion and Pizza: More silver-haired silliness in Yorkshire. Mervyn is in love with 'Her' at the pizza take-away, but lacks the courage to tell her. Can Alvin and Entwistle help?
It's Never Ten Years: More pensioner power in the much-loved sitcom. Clegg and Truly reminisce about their old friend Compo, who suffered at the hands of Nora Batty, and themselves.
Get Out of That, Then: The world's longest-running sitcom. Lenny is convinced that he has a future in showbusiness as an escapologist, but his sidekick Cliff isn't so enthusiastic.
The Penitent Man: Flambeau is incarcerated under suspicion of murder, but denies killing his cohort Flynn, and asks Father Brown to hear his confession if he is convicted.
The gripping police drama series starring Sarah Lancashire continues. Tommy brutally takes control of a situation when PC McAskill pulls him and Lewis over.
Bank Robbery: Mystery and comedy with our team of mature detectives using 20th century skills to fight 21st century crime. The team target Ray Cook, a criminal turned celebrity.
